misfits.title: Bad Coin
misfits.description: Good and shoddy pass at the same bar, so the shoddy circulates and the careful work is quietly withdrawn.

misfits.title: Chesterton's Fence
misfits.description: A safeguard whose purpose everyone has forgotten is cleared away as useless, and the quiet harm it prevented returns.

misfits.title: Closing Ranks
misfits.description: A close, confident team converges on one view and quietly closes ranks against the doubt that would have saved it.

misfits.title: Everybody's Business
misfits.description: A decision everyone can see and anyone could own is dropped, because each assumes it is somebody else's to hold.

misfits.title: Fixes that Fail
misfits.description: A fix relieves the symptom now, and its delayed side effect worsens the problem, so more of the same fix is applied.

misfits.title: Good Money After Bad
misfits.description: A doomed project is funded past every reason to stop: each gate weighs what was spent, not what is left to gain.

misfits.title: Jevons Paradox
misfits.description: Make a resource go further per unit and total use rises, as cheaper service draws more demand than the saving spared.

misfits.title: Metric Fixation
misfits.description: A number chosen to stand for a goal is hit exactly and truthfully, and the goal it stood for quietly dies.

misfits.title: Moral Hazard
misfits.description: Insure a risk and the care taken against it falls, because the one who carries the risk no longer carries the loss.

misfits.title: Path Dependence
misfits.description: A lead won by accident compounds as each adopter picks what others picked, until a worse standard locks in for good.

misfits.title: Regulatory Capture
misfits.description: A watchdog set to guard the public against an industry comes, in time, to guard the industry against the public.

misfits.title: Rising to Unfit
misfits.description: The best are promoted for mastering a job into a different one they cannot do, and cannot be moved back from.

misfits.title: Sandbag
misfits.description: Beat the target and next year's is higher, so everyone hits the number and hides the rest, and no one shows their best.

misfits.title: Saving Face
misfits.description: A courteous team keeps every mistake unspoken, fixing what it can name and never learning what it cannot say.

misfits.title: Seed Corn
misfits.description: The quarter's number is hit by eating the seed corn: the present looks strong, and the future pays the bill.

misfits.title: Shifting the Burden
misfits.description: Reach for the quick fix and the capacity for the real cure withers, until the fix is the only thing that still works.

misfits.title: Social Loafing
misfits.description: In a group each pulls a little softer, because effort blends into the pool and no single hand can be seen to slack.

misfits.title: The Anticommons
misfits.description: Too many owners each hold a veto over one resource, so it sits idle: anyone can say no, and no one can say yes.

misfits.title: The Bank Run
misfits.description: Each saver runs because he fears the others will, so a solvent bank is felled by the very fear that it might fail.

misfits.title: The Bounce
misfits.description: Punish the slump and it recovers, praise the streak and it falls, so we learn that toughness works and praise is poison.

misfits.title: The Bus Factor
misfits.description: A team runs fast on the one person who knows everything, until the day they are gone and the knowledge with them.

misfits.title: The Cargo Cult
misfits.description: A team copies the exact form of a proven success, and no cargo lands, because the form was never what made it work.

misfits.title: The Cobra Effect
misfits.description: A bounty set to reduce a problem is farmed instead, so the reward breeds the very thing it pays to remove.

misfits.title: The Colour of the Bike Shed
misfits.description: A meeting scrutinises the trivial thing everyone understands and waves through the vital thing no one does.

misfits.title: The Commons
misfits.description: Everyone takes a fair share of the shared field, and the field goes bare, because the cost of one more is split by all.

misfits.title: The Decision Travels
misfits.description: A correct decision crosses the whole chain while the Body who must live with it never follows it.

misfits.title: The Extra Road
misfits.description: A road added to ease the jam draws everyone onto it, and the whole network slows: more capacity, less flow.

misfits.title: The Frozen Middle
misfits.description: A bold change dies in the middle: softened on the way down, and the hard truth smoothed on the way up.

misfits.title: The Head Start
misfits.description: An early lead attracts the credit and resources that make the next lead, so small head starts compound into dominance.

misfits.title: The Market for Lemons
misfits.description: Buyers cannot tell good from bad, so they pay the average, which drives the good out and leaves the market to lemons.

misfits.title: The Mirror
misfits.description: Teams ship a system shaped like their own org chart, so the software's seams fall exactly where the teams don't talk.

misfits.title: The New Normal
misfits.description: Each small deviation is tolerated once and becomes the standard, so the line of acceptable creeps until it fails.

misfits.title: The Ninth Woman
misfits.description: More people are added to a late project to speed it up, and the ramp-up and cross-talk make it later still.

misfits.title: The Shirky Principle
misfits.description: The body built to cure a problem comes to depend on it, so it solves just enough to stay needed, never enough to end.

misfits.title: The Success Trap
misfits.description: A firm does everything right, and is undone from below by the one market its own discipline was built to refuse.

misfits.title: The Survivors
misfits.description: You study the survivors and armor the bullet holes, because the planes hit elsewhere never came back to be counted.

misfits.title: The Trip to Abilene
misfits.description: A group agrees its way into a choice no member wanted, each misreading the others' assent for a wish it lacked.

misfits.title: The Winning Bid
misfits.description: In a common-value auction the bidder who most overestimates wins, so to win is to have overpaid.

misfits.title: Watermelon Reporting
misfits.description: Green on the skin, red in the flesh: the red never reaches a seat that can act, because every rung is paid to move on.
